leadText: This article is about the Key Item. For the expansion for Pokémon Scarlet and Violet, see The Teal Mask. The Teal Mask (Japanese: みどりのめん Green Mask) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IX, and the titular item of The Teal Mask.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Teal Mask is to be returned to Ogerpon as part of the plot.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A teal mask patterned after the face of an ogre. Ogerpon dropped it while fleeing up the stairs after visiting the Festival of Masks.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.5 Non-item appearances In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price S V N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Teal Mask is to be returned to Ogerpon as part of the plot. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A teal mask patterned after the face of an ogre. Ogerpon dropped it while fleeing up the stairs after visiting the Festival of Masks. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method S V TM Kitakami Hall (dropped by Ogerpon on the first night of the Festival of Masks ) Non-item appearances [ edit | edit source ] Ogerpon wears the Teal Mask in its Teal Mask form, which is its default form when it is not holding the Wellspring Mask , Hearthflame Mask , or Cornerstone Mask .
